title.purpose: Now-playing header line; truncates on narrow widths.

micro.purpose: Uppercase section eyebrows; max one per sheet.

motion.name: reel-spin
motion.purpose: Deck reel ticks only; pause when prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Add Tape Button
components.description: Primary native product action: load or edit tape.
components.css: .ds-btn-add-tape { background: transparent; color: #E9E64B; border: 1px solid #E9E64B; border-radius: 18px; padding: 8px 18px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: lowercase; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-add-tape:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-add-tape:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E9E64B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Spotify Connect Button
components.description: Filled CTA for Spotify OAuth only.
components.css: .ds-btn-spotify { background: #1DB954; color: #0B0B0B; border: none; border-radius: 18px; padding: 8px 18px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: lowercase; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-spotify:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-spotify:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1DB954; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Spotify Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-spotify-ghost { background: transparent; color: #1DB954; border: 1px solid #1DB954; border-radius: 18px; padding: 8px 18px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: lowercase; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-spotify-ghost:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-spotify-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1DB954; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Play Control
components.description: Primary transport; text-only on void background.
components.css: .ds-control-play { background: transparent; color: #ADADAD; border: none; padding: 8px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 1px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-control-play:hover { color: #D8D8D8; } .ds-control-play:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E9E64B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tape Editor Row
components.description: Track row in tape editor with index, title, duration, action.
components.html:
01
Track TitleArtist Name
3:42✕
components.css: .ds-tape-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #1C1C1C; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-tape-row__index { color: #E9E64B; font-size: 13px; width: 22px; } .ds-tape-row__text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-tape-row__title { display: block; color: #EDEDED; font-size: 15px; } .ds-tape-row__artist { display: block; color: #777777; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-tape-row__dur { color: #888888; font-size: 13px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-tape-row__action { color: #E9E64B; font-size: 18px; width: 22px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Tape Editor Sheet Header
components.description: Bottom sheet header with title, count, done action.
components.css: .ds-sheet-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; background: #101010; } .ds-sheet-header__title { color: #F2F2F2; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 1px; } .ds-sheet-header__count { color: #888888; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 1px; } .ds-sheet-header__done { background: transparent; border: none; color: #E9E64B; font-size: 15px; letter-spacing: 1px; cursor: pointer; padding: 8px; } .ds-sheet-header__done:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E9E64B; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Tapepod looks like a flat, head-on cassette mechanism drawn with registration marks and one signal color. The UI is near-black void; the deck is the hero; chrome is hardware labeling (lowercase, letter-spaced, no marketing voice). Density is calm: one column, max 480px frame, nothing competing with reel geometry.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained palette: tinted neutrals on void plus yellow accent on ≤10% of any screen.
System typography only; weight and letter-spacing carry hierarchy.
Flat elevation via surface steps and 1px dividers, never drop shadows.
Primary product actions are yellow outline pills; filled buttons reserved for Spotify.
The Deck SVG owns motion and progress; surrounding UI stays static.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Yellow appears on mechanism lines and one product action per screen. If yellow is on a card background, a gradient, and a button simultaneously, the screen is over-signaled.

rules.name: The Service Color Rule
rules.body: Green is Spotify's lane. Never use #1DB954 for Tapepod-native actions like load tape or play.

rules.name: The Lowercase Voice Rule
rules.body: UI copy stays lowercase except transport state, section micro-labels, and proper nouns. No title-case marketing headings.

rules.name: The Tabular Time Rule
rules.body: Durations use tabular numerals so list columns stay aligned.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Never combine border 1px solid with soft wide drop shadows on the same element. Pick a hairline border or a surface step, not both as decoration.

rules.name: The Flat Deck Rule
rules.body: The Deck SVG sits directly on void. Do not wrap it in a bordered card or panel.

dos: Do keep the deck as the largest visual element on the player screen.
Do use yellow for mechanism lines and one native product action per view.
Do use #ADADAD or lighter for essential control text on #0B0B0B (AAA ≥7:1).
Do use 44pt minimum touch targets on all pressables (hitSlop where visual size is smaller).
Do label pressables for VoiceOver (Play, Pause, Connect Spotify, Disconnect Spotify).
donts: Don't use SaaS dashboard patterns: card grids, gradient accents, hero metrics, eyebrow kickers, ghost-card borders with wide drop shadows, modal-first flows for simple tasks.
Don't clone generic streaming app chrome (album art hero, gradient player backgrounds, shuffle row of circular icons).
Don't use #888888 for play/pause or other essential controls on void; it fails AAA.
Don't add drop shadows to pills, sheets, or the deck wrapper.
Don't use yellow as a full-screen or large-panel fill; it is a signal stroke, not a surface.
Don't nest cards or add side-stripe accent borders on list rows.
Don't use uppercase body copy beyond micro section labels and transport state.
